Off Calendar Jun-01-2006 Text Ruling

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Jun-01-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion for Apportionment proceeding and Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Angie Diner.
Paul Vaillancourt, Esq. for Plaintiffs/Legal Heirs of Vincent Cambis, Deceased.
James Ficenec, Esq. for Plaintiff and with Plaintiff: Nancy Cambis.
Plaintiff: Christopher Cambis, present in pro per.
No appearance by Plaintiff: Denean Chase, copy of declartion received in court.
Parties were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court taken the matter under submission.
Proposed Order received in court.
June 1, 2006
Order signed by Comm. Kaplan.
